title: Overview of Capital Market Services for the Economic and Social Development of Guizhou in 2025
description: In 2025, Guizhou's capital market reforms were guided by Xi Jinping's Thought, focusing on enhancing services for regional economic development. Key initiatives included improving institutional mechanisms, increasing direct financing, and supporting rural revitalization through financial services.

analysis: The policy outlines significant advancements in Guizhou's capital market, emphasizing its role in regional economic development and modernization. By implementing reforms aligned with the Communist Party's directives, Guizhou has improved institutional frameworks and financial services, particularly for the real economy and rural revitalization. The introduction of innovative financial products, such as technology and green bonds, demonstrates a commitment to supporting local industries and sustainable practices. Furthermore, the capital market's engagement in educational and public welfare initiatives highlights its dedication to social responsibility, benefiting numerous communities and enhancing overall quality of life in the province.

key_points.content: Guizhou's capital market reforms focus on integrating financial tools into the provincial industrial system, enhancing local economic development.
The capital market in Guizhou actively supports rural revitalization through financial assistance and educational initiatives, benefiting thousands.
Guizhou has introduced innovative financial products, including technology innovation bonds and green corporate bonds, to support local enterprises.

full_content.description: In 2025, Guizhou's capital market reforms were guided by Xi Jinping's Thought, focusing on enhancing services for regional economic development. Key initiatives included improving institutional mechanisms, increasing direct financing, and supporting rural revitalization through financial services.

chinese_original:
2025年，资本市场各方以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，认真贯彻落实党的二十大、二十届历次全会精神，深入学习贯彻习近平总书记在贵州考察时的重要讲话精神，认真落实证监会党委关于深化资本市场改革一系列部署，结合贵州实际，积极探索资本市场服务区域经济发展的“贵州实践”，在服务贵州高质量发展和现代化进程中取得新成效。

一、资本市场服务贵州现代化产业体系建设的体制机制不断完善

省委十三届八次全会审议通过《中共贵州省委关于制定贵州省国民经济和社会发展第十五个五年规划的建议》，对梯次培育推进企业上市、发展和运用多层次资本市场、积极发展股权债券等直接融资作出专门部署，与《贵州省推动资本市场高质量发展实施方案》相互衔接，为“十五五”时期资本市场服务现代化产业体系建设“举旗定向”。全省各方积极推动将资本市场工具运用纳入我省产业体系建设布局，为全方位发挥资本市场功能作用提供了坚实保障。贵州证监局、省委金融办等部门联合编印《贵州省领导干部金融知识读本》，成功举办覆盖全省88个县处级领导干部利用和发展资本市场能力提升专题研讨班，贵州各级领导干部利用和发展资本市场意识能力持续提升。贵阳市创新建立“上市企业之家”，为上市公司提供精准化、全周期的政务服务。贵州资本市场服务中心创新打造资本市场“四库一联盟”服务平台，构建“股债基期”全覆盖、高效链接市场各方的“一站式”服务枢纽，助力加快形成支撑贵州特色现代化产业体系建设的资本市场创新生态。一系列政策机制的不断完善，为助力贵州高质量发展提供了基础和条件。

二、资本市场服务实体经济质效持续增强

贵州资本市场牢牢把握服务实体经济本源，为地方经济社会发展重大战略、重点领域、薄弱环节提供高质量金融产品和服务。2025年，贵州直接融资金额稳步增长，各类市场主体利用资本市场实现直接融资775.46亿元，为我省产业升级、项目建设和民生改善提供了有力支撑。公司信用类债券融资成本持续下降，平均票面利率3.31 %，较上年同期下降49个基点，为企业减负增效提供实实在在支持。证券行业机构持续为我省企业提供高质量股权融资、债券融资、并购重组、财富管理等服务，实现融资485.72亿元。私募基金资产管理规模提升至1940亿元，政府引导基金累计撬动资金超2100亿元，私募股权创投基金投早、投小、投硬科技的规模效应和协同效应已经显现。上市公司质量和投资价值双提升，全省上市公司实施年度分红金额超680亿，回购金额72亿元，均位居西部第一。上市公司获交易所信息披露A类评价家数占比排名全国第五。上市公司常态化走访机制不断完善，协调解决了一批影响企业发展的重点难点问题，走访工作从“全面覆盖”向“精准赋能”转变。

三、资本市场服务“五篇大文章”功能作用取得新突破

贵州资本市场发挥功能作用，全力做好科技金融、绿色金融、普惠金融、养老金融、数字金融“五篇大文章”。2025年，制度框架进一步优化完善，联合多部门出台高质量做好金融“五篇大文章”实施方案，健全覆盖各类企业发展全生命周期需求的“股债基期”产品和服务体系。科技金融在债券市场实现多个创新突破，贵州国资运营公司发行全省首单科技创新公司债，华创证券发行全省首单金融机构科创债，水电九局发行全省首单“知识产权+科技创新”资产证券化产品，中伟股份获批全省首单“一带一路”创新债券，精准支持我省企业科技创新与产业升级。打通县域绿色金融服务壁垒，贵州泽通水资源产业集团获批乡村振兴绿色公司债，成为贵州近年来首个获批新发债券的县级国企，为债券市场更好服务贵州县域经济提供新范例。证券期货行业普惠金融服务效能持续释放，全省首家鸡蛋期货交割库获批，新设1家生猪期货交割库，1家生猪期货交割库顺利开展首次实物交割，2家企业进入交易所产融基地储备库名单。全年累计开展“保险+期货”项目130余个，保障农产品现货金额超15亿元，期货市场服务乡村振兴和企业风险管理的作用进一步发挥。

四、资本市场服务乡村振兴成果日渐丰硕

贵州资本市场始终坚守金融为民初心，积极服务乡村振兴大局，用金融力量书写责任与担当。2025年，资本市场主体接续推动帮扶地区发展和乡村振兴。全国31家证券公司通过“一司一县”机制与省内56个县区签署帮扶协议。贵州证监局联合上交所公益基金会持续深化贵州助学帮教公益项目，新增投入公益基金583万元，实施公益项目6个，累计已覆盖全省160余所中小学，5万名师生受助。“证爱贵州”资本市场教育慈善信托计划持续支持民族地区、革命老区和重点帮扶地区教育事业，向全省180名高考生、680名中考生捐赠奖学金，向贫困地区教师发放稳岗补贴，全年捐赠231.48万元。资本市场主体以责任担当践行扶危济困，“624”“628”洪灾期间向黔东南州捐赠资金物资，帮助受灾地区防汛救灾和灾后重建。证券公司深度参与县域碳金融建设，全省首单林业碳汇CCER项目申报。贵州证监局帮扶点从江县秋里村特色产业、基础设施、人居环境、教育水平不断提质升级，村集体经济收入连续三年突破百万元，为乡村振兴提供了可复制、可推广的实践样本。
english_translation:
In 2025, all parties in the capital market, guided by Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, earnestly implemented the spirit of the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China and the successive plenary sessions of the 20th Central Committee. They deeply studied and implemented the important speech delivered by General Secretary Xi Jinping during his inspection in Guizhou, and diligently executed the series of deployments by the Party Committee of the China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) regarding the deepening of capital market reforms. In light of Guizhou's actual conditions, they actively explored the "Guizhou practice" of capital market services for regional economic development, achieving new results in supporting Guizhou's high-quality development and modernization process.

I. The institutional mechanisms for capital market services in building Guizhou's modern industrial system are continuously improving.

The 8th Plenary Session of the 13th Provincial Party Committee reviewed and approved the "Suggestions of the Guizhou Provincial Committee of the Communist Party of China on Formulating the 15th Five-Year Plan for National Economic and Social Development of Guizhou Province," which specifically deployed the gradual cultivation and promotion of enterprise listings, the development and utilization of a multi-level capital market, and the active development of equity and bond direct financing. This aligns with the "Implementation Plan for Promoting High-Quality Development of the Capital Market in Guizhou Province," providing direction for the capital market's service to the construction of a modern industrial system during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period. All parties in the province actively promoted the integration of capital market tools into the layout of the provincial industrial system, providing a solid guarantee for the comprehensive functioning of the capital market. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau, the Provincial Financial Office, and other departments jointly compiled the "Financial Knowledge Reader for Guizhou Provincial Leaders," successfully holding specialized seminars to enhance the capacity of leaders from 88 counties and cities in utilizing and developing the capital market. The awareness and capability of leaders at all levels in Guizhou to utilize and develop the capital market have continuously improved. Guiyang City innovatively established a "Home for Listed Companies," providing precise and comprehensive government services throughout the lifecycle of listed companies. The Guizhou Capital Market Service Center innovatively created a service platform of "Four Libraries and One Alliance," constructing a "one-stop" service hub that covers "stocks, bonds, funds, and futures" and efficiently connects all market participants, helping to accelerate the formation of an innovative ecosystem in the capital market that supports the construction of Guizhou's characteristic modern industrial system. The continuous improvement of a series of policy mechanisms has provided the foundation and conditions for supporting Guizhou's high-quality development.

II. The quality and effectiveness of capital market services for the real economy continue to enhance.

The Guizhou capital market firmly grasps its original mission of serving the real economy, providing high-quality financial products and services for major strategies, key areas, and weak links in local economic and social development. In 2025, the amount of direct financing in Guizhou steadily increased, with various market entities achieving direct financing of 77.546 billion yuan through the capital market, providing strong support for the province's industrial upgrading, project construction, and improvement of people's livelihoods. The financing costs of corporate credit bonds continued to decline, with an average coupon rate of 3.31%, down 49 basis points from the same period last year, providing tangible support for reducing burdens and increasing efficiency for enterprises. Securities industry institutions continuously provided high-quality services such as equity financing, bond financing, mergers and acquisitions, and wealth management for enterprises in the province, achieving financing of 48.572 billion yuan. The asset management scale of private equity funds increased to 194 billion yuan, and government-guided funds have leveraged over 210 billion yuan in total. The scale and synergy effects of private equity venture capital funds investing early, small, and in hard technology have begun to show. The quality and investment value of listed companies have both improved, with the total annual dividend amount exceeding 68 billion yuan and repurchase amount reaching 7.2 billion yuan, both ranking first in the western region. The proportion of listed companies receiving Class A ratings for information disclosure from the stock exchange ranked fifth nationwide. The regular visiting mechanism for listed companies has been continuously improved, coordinating to resolve a number of key issues affecting enterprise development, with the visiting work shifting from "comprehensive coverage" to "precise empowerment."

III. New breakthroughs have been achieved in the functional role of the capital market in serving the "Five Major Articles."

The Guizhou capital market has played its functional role, fully committed to advancing the "Five Major Articles" of financial services: technology finance, green finance, inclusive finance, pension finance, and digital finance. In 2025, the institutional framework was further optimized, with multiple departments jointly issuing high-quality implementation plans for the "Five Major Articles," establishing a product and service system that covers the entire lifecycle needs of various enterprises with "stocks, bonds, funds, and futures." Technology finance achieved multiple innovative breakthroughs in the bond market, with the Guizhou State-owned Assets Operation Company issuing the province's first technology innovation corporate bond, Huachuang Securities issuing the province's first financial institution technology innovation bond, and the Water and Electricity Ninth Bureau issuing the province's first "intellectual property + technology innovation" asset securitization product. Zhongwei Co., Ltd. was approved for the province's first "Belt and Road" innovation bond, precisely supporting the technological innovation and industrial upgrading of enterprises in the province. Barriers to green financial services in county areas were broken down, with the Guizhou Zetong Water Resources Industry Group approved for a rural revitalization green corporate bond, becoming the first county-level state-owned enterprise in Guizhou in recent years to be approved for a new bond issuance, providing a new model for the bond market to better serve the county economy in Guizhou. The inclusive financial service efficiency of the securities and futures industry has continued to be released, with the province's first egg futures delivery warehouse approved, and one new live pig futures delivery warehouse established, successfully conducting its first physical delivery. Two enterprises entered the list of reserve bases for the exchange's production and finance integration. Throughout the year, over 130 "insurance + futures" projects were carried out, ensuring the spot value of agricultural products exceeded 1.5 billion yuan, further demonstrating the role of the futures market in supporting rural revitalization and enterprise risk management.

IV. The achievements of the capital market in serving rural revitalization are becoming increasingly fruitful.

The Guizhou capital market has always adhered to the original intention of serving the people through finance, actively supporting the overall situation of rural revitalization, and writing responsibility and commitment with financial strength. In 2025, capital market entities continued to promote the development of assisted areas and rural revitalization. A total of 31 securities companies nationwide signed assistance agreements with 56 counties and districts in the province through the "One Company, One County" mechanism. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau, in collaboration with the Shanghai Stock Exchange Public Welfare Foundation, continued to deepen the public welfare project of assisting education in Guizhou, adding 5.83 million yuan to the public welfare fund, implementing six public welfare projects, and covering over 160 primary and secondary schools in the province, benefiting 50,000 teachers and students. The "Zheng Ai Guizhou" capital market education charity trust plan continues to support education in ethnic minority areas, revolutionary old areas, and key assistance areas, donating scholarships to 180 college entrance examination candidates and 680 middle school entrance examination candidates, as well as providing stable job subsidies to teachers in impoverished areas, with total donations reaching 2.3148 million yuan for the year. Capital market entities practice their responsibility and commitment to help those in need, donating funds and materials to Qiandongnan Prefecture during the "624" and "628" floods, assisting affected areas in flood prevention, disaster relief, and post-disaster reconstruction. Securities companies have deeply participated in the construction of carbon finance in county areas, with the province's first forestry carbon sink CCER project being submitted. The Guizhou Securities Regulatory Bureau's assistance efforts in Qiuli Village, Jiangjun County, have continuously improved the quality of characteristic industries, infrastructure, living environment, and education levels, with the village's collective economic income exceeding one million yuan for three consecutive years, providing a replicable and promotable practical model for rural revitalization.

impact_analysis.details: Capital market reforms in Guizhou enhance direct financing options, reducing corporate credit bond costs and improving access to capital for local enterprises.
The establishment of a 'Home for Listed Companies' and a service hub supports investment management and enhances the capital market's efficiency.
